author: Gemini CLI
objective: Enhance user signup with extra fields, implement location picker with auto-detect, cache user data for easy loading, pre-fill order forms, and add a settings page for profile management.

features.name: User Data Caching
features.description: Store user orders and login/signup info (id, name, username, email, phone, is_whatsapp, location coordinates, and location name) in local storage for easy loading.

features.name: Enhanced Signup Form
features.description: Update signup to include name, username, email, phone number, 'is in WhatsApp?', and a map-based location picker.

features.name: Location Picker Enhancement
features.description: Add 'Auto-detect' functionality to MapPicker and capture location names and coordinates with at least 10m accuracy if possible.

features.name: Smart Ordering System
features.description: Pre-fill ordering fields (name, phone, location) from cached user data, while allowing user to modify them if needed.

features.name: Settings Page
features.description: Create a settings view to allow users to update their cached profile information, except for the user ID (timestamp).

features.name: Submission Feedback
features.description: Implement a nice modal/dialogue for order submission feedback with a placeholder for the server API call.

implementation_steps.name: Define Enhanced User Schema
implementation_steps.description: Update TypeScript interfaces for UserData to include all required fields.

implementation_steps.name: Enhance Signup Flow
implementation_steps.description: Update the signup UI to include new fields and integrate the map picker.

implementation_steps.name: Update Cache and State Management
implementation_steps.description: Modify the app state to handle the new user data and ensure it's persisted in localStorage.

implementation_steps.name: Enhance Order Flow
implementation_steps.description: Update the order view to pre-populate data from the user profile.

implementation_steps.name: Implement Settings View
implementation_steps.description: Add a new 'settings' view accessible from the header to update user profile.

implementation_steps.name: Improve MapPicker and Location Services
implementation_steps.description: Add geolocation auto-detect and reverse geocoding for location names.

implementation_steps.name: Add Feedback Dialogues
implementation_steps.description: Create a modal component for order confirmation and success messages.
